violations.text: The meat walk-in cooler, and the dairy cooler gasket was observed in poor. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025

The floor in the Dairy walk-in cooler, and isles 3 and 7 have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025
